description: Graph-structured memory contract for relationship-aware recall, enrichment, and consolidation across incident, research, and operational contexts.

recall.description: Retrieve graph-linked facts, incidents, entities, and relationships relevant to the current query.

learn.description: Persist a new observation or derived relationship into graph memory.

consolidate.description: Merge repeated observations into more durable graph structure.

enrich.description: Add linked historical incidents, dependencies, or related entities to a current anomaly set.
